findings.location: s1 — diConfig column in parameter table
findings.description: The source qualifies the two config file names with 'Nablarch Samapleプロジェクトの場合には' (i.e., these values apply specifically to the Nablarch Sample project). The knowledge file omits this qualifier and presents the filenames as if they were universal defaults, which could mislead an AI into recommending them for non-sample projects.
findings.source_evidence: # Nablarch Samapleプロジェクトの場合には、以下の構成となっています。\n# 都度起動バッチ:batch-component-configuration.xml\n# 常駐バッチ:resident-batch-component-configuration.xml
